title.ko: 장갑; 장갑포탑; 장갑차량 또는 병장차(兵裝車); 공격 또는 방어의 수단일반, 예. 위장일반
title.en: ARMOUR; ARMOURED TURRETS; ARMOURED OR ARMED VEHICLES; MEANS OF ATTACK OR DEFENCE, e.g. CAMOUFLAGE, IN GENERAL

definition.ko: 장갑 인원방어용 F41H1/00 장갑판, 방패 F41H5/00 위장(CAMOUFLAGE) F41H3/00 장갑차량 또는 무장 차량 F41H7/00 화염, 가스 또는 화학전쟁 F41H9/00 기타 공격 또는 방어수단 F41H11/00, F41H13/00

title.ko: 인원방호구(人員防護具)(개인용 방패 F41H 5/08 화학전에 대한 보호수단 A62B)
title.en: Personal protection-gear (shields for personal use F41H0005080000;for protection against chemical warfare A62B)
Armoured or projectile- or missile-resistant garments; Composite protection fabrics

title.ko: 보호헬멧(크래쉬 헬멧 A42B 3/00)
title.en: Protection helmets (crash helmets A42B0003000000)
of steel; Steel head-shields
of plastics; Plastic head-shields

title.ko: 위장, 즉 은폐 또는 위장의 수단 또는 방법(선박용 B63G 8/34, 13/02)
title.en: Camouflage, i.e. means or methods for concealment or disguise (for vessels B63G0008340000, B63G0013020000)

title.ko: 덮개(cover), 예. 스크린(screens), 그물(제조는 관련있는 클래스 참조 예 D04)
title.en: Covers, e.g. screens, nets (making thereof, see the relevant classes, e.g. D04)

title.ko: 장갑; 장갑판; 방패 (제조 또는 처리방법 B21, C21)
title.en: Armour; Armour plates; Shields  (processes for manufacturing or treating B21, C21)
Reactive armour; Dynamic armour
Mounting or securing armour plates
Plate construction
composed of more than one layer

title.ko: 방패(선박용 B63G 9/00, 항공기용 B64D 7/00)
title.en: Shields (in ships B63G0009000000;in aircraft B64D0007000000)
for personal use
Spade bayonets, i.e. usable as a spade, bayonet, or cover against rifle fire
for smallarms; for light-rocket launchers
Wheeled armoured shields
for ordnance
Rotating shields
Turrets

title.ko: 맨홀(manhole) 덮개, 예. 탱크위에(일반 F16J)
title.en: Manhole covers, e.g. on tanks (in general F16J)
for stationary use, e.g. fortifications

title.ko: 들여다 보는 구멍(peepholes), 창(유리의 제조 또는 조성 C03 그를 위한 덮개
title.en: Peepholes; Windows (manufacture or composition of glass C03); Covers therefor

title.ko: 장갑차량 또는 병장차량(일반적인 차량의 관점 B60; 장갑함선 또는 병장함선 B63G; 장갑항공기 또는 병장항공기 B64D; 총포가, 예. 차량상의 기관총 F41A 23/00)
title.en: Armoured or armed vehicles (general vehicle aspects B60;armoured or armed ships B63G;armoured or armed aircraft B64D;mounting guns, e.g. machine-guns, on vehicles F41A0023000000)

title.ko: 전장갑(全裝甲)지상차, 예. 탱크(무한궤도차, 그것의 조종 B62D)
title.en: Land vehicles with enclosing armour, e.g. tanks (endless-track vehicles, steering thereof B62D)
Air-pressurised compartments for crew; Means for preventing admission of noxious substances, e.g. combustion gas from gun barrels, in crew compartments; Sealing arrangements

title.ko: 장갑판의 구조(일반 F41H 5/00)
title.en: Armour construction (in general F41H0005000000)
Mine-laying land vehicles

title.ko: 화염, 가스 또는 연기를 분사해서 공격 또는 방어하는 용구, 화학전쟁용구(대화학 방어 A62B
title.en: Equipment for attack or defence by spreading flame, gas, or smoke; Chemical warfare equipment (protection against chemicals A62B)

title.ko: 화염 투사기(식물파괴용 A01M 15/00)
title.en: Flame-throwing apparatus (for destroying vegetation A01M0015000000)

title.ko: 가스 방사기, 예. 최루가스용(F41H 9/10이 우선)
title.en: Gas blowing apparatus, e.g. for tear gas (F41H0009100000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 인공적인 안개 또는 연기 발생용(발연통(發煙筒) 투사기, 예. 차량에 장치된 것, F42B 5/155)
title.en: Apparatus for generating artificial fog or smoke screens (smoke-pot projectors, e.g. arranged on vehicles, F42B0005155000)
Smoke-pots without propulsive charge, i.e. stationary
Hand-held or body-worn self-defence devices using repellant gases or chemicals

title.ko: 방어 시설; 방어 장치 (구조적 측면은 섹션 E 참조, 예. E04H9/04); 지뢰 제거 또는 탐지 수단
title.en: Defence installations; Defence devices  (constructional aspects, see section E, e.g. E04H0009040000); Means for clearing or detecting landmines

title.ko: 대공 또는 대유도 미사일 방어 시설 또는 시스템 (연기를 생성하거나 레이더 챠프(radar chaff) 또는 적외선물질을 분배하기 위한 카트리지 또는 미사일 F42B5/15, F42B12/48, F42B12/70)
title.en: Anti-aircraft or anti-guided missile defence installations or systems (cartridges or missiles for producing smoke or for dispensing radar chaff or infrared material F42B0005150000, F42B0012480000, F42B0012700000)
Aerial barrages
Net barriers for harbour defence
Gun-traps

title.ko: 유자(有刺)철선(鐵線) 장애물; 바리케이드; 지주(stanchions) 탱크트랩; 차량의 저지수단; 첨두부철구
title.en: Barbed-wire obstacles; Barricades; Stanchions; Tank traps; Vehicle-impeding devices; Caltrops
Dispensing-apparatus therefor, e.g. devices for dispensing and reeling barbed wire

title.ko: 유자철선장애물의 제거 또는 무효화(와이어절단을 위한 소화기 취부구 F41C 27/20)
title.en: Clearing or neutralising barbed-wire obstacles (smallarm attachments for wire cutting F41C0027200000)

title.ko: 지뢰 매설 지역 청소 방법; 지뢰 검출을 위해 특히 적합한 시스템
title.en: Means for clearing land minefields; Systems specially adapted for detection of landmines
Systems specially adapted for detection of landmines
Biological systems, e.g. with detection by animals or plants
Chemical systems, e.g. with detection by vapour analysis
Magnetic, electromagnetic, acoustic or radiation systems, e.g. ground penetrating radars or metal-detectors
Mechanical systems, e.g. prodding sticks for manual detection
Explosive line charges, e.g. snakes

title.ko: 자체 추진 지뢰 제거 차량; 차량에 부착가능한 지뢰 제거 장치
title.en: Self-propelled mine-clearing vehicles; Mine-clearing devices attachable to vehicles
with ground-impacting means for activating mines by the use of mechanical impulses, e.g. flails or stamping elements

title.ko: 지면을 관통하는 요소를 가지는 것, 예. 흙에 묻힌 지뢰를 제거하는 수단을 가지는 것(F41H 11/18이 우선)
title.en: with ground-penetrating elements, e.g. with means for removing buried landmines from the soil (F41H0011180000 takes precedence)
the elements being excavation buckets
the elements being ploughs
the elements being rotary ground-penetrating elements
using brushing or sweeping means or dozers to push mines lying on a surface aside; using means for removing mines intact from a surface
with rollers creating a surface load on the ground, e.g. steadily increasing surface load, for triggering purposes
Decoy or sacrificial vehicles; Decoy or sacrificial devices attachable to vehicles
Means of attack or defence not otherwise provided for
